title: juniperus virginiana var. schottii
intro: Juniperus virginiana var. schottii, also known as the Rocky Mountain juniper, is a variety of evergreen tree or shrub that belongs to the cypress family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Juniperus virginiana var. schottii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce urinary tract infections, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Juniper berries can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
